notes: v0.16.80 — Mini-boss spawn order + force visible defensive fix. Follow-up hotfix for rift MINI-BOSS empty-arena report that persisted past v0.16.79. Spawn flow rewritten to set `global_position` AFTER `add_child` (canonical Godot 4 order — pre-parent position is treated as local and can resolve to a stale offset when a previous match's transform is still being torn down). Forced `visible = true` and `alive = true` explicitly on player and boss right after parenting so neither can carry forward a stale die() invisibility flag. `kind` for the MiniBoss is now assigned earlier so the kind-specific update loop runs from frame 1. Windows only.
